changes: Added AtlasRecommendationWorkgraphReadinessPacket with schema, builder, and validator.
mission recommendations import now emits workgraph-readiness-packet.json beside the wave, workgraph, lease, readback, and prompt artifacts.
mission recommendations readback accepts --out-workgraph-readiness-packet to regenerate the packet from any wave/workgraph readback.
Added regression coverage for 40-node budget preservation, digest binding, CLI regeneration, schema required fields, and stale packet rejection.
Updated production readiness to require the schema and assert the generated packet fields.
